description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits chlorosis and necrosis. Leaf margin shows signs of desiccation and irregular damage. Surface appears slightly textured, potentially due to fungal sporulation."} {"description": "Multiple, discrete lesions are present. Lesions are primarily dark brown to black, circular to irregular in shape, and exhibit a slightly raised or scabrous texture. Some lesions have a chlorotic halo. Evidence of lesion coalescence is observed."} Lesions are distributed across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration on the lower portion and along the margins. Distribution appears somewhat random, but with a tendency to cluster.
